case_title: PIERRE MARTIN VS. AL MATTOCKS ET AL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTIN, PIERRE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MATTOCKS, AL AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 4317 21ST STREET, UNIT NUMBER 1 CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94114, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 68204477)
